acceptance_criteria.AC1: The workflow can start from a local synthetic story fixture instead of a live Azure DevOps work item link.
acceptance_criteria.AC2: The intake stage preserves the raw synthetic story input and normalizes acceptance criteria into the canonical intake artifacts consumed by downstream stages.
acceptance_criteria.AC3: ADO-specific actions are skipped when the synthetic story does not provide Azure DevOps metadata.

processing_notes: Source is local synthetic fixture (not live Azure DevOps)
Acceptance criteria normalized from list to keyed format (AC1–AC3)
No ADO metadata present; ADO-specific processing skipped
Fixture content fully preserved under raw_input in story.yaml
All three artifacts follow canonical schema
No ambiguities or open questions identified
